description: This prompt generates a realistic editorial-style portrait of a bookish young woman in a sunlit garden, ideal for lifestyle photography, literary branding, or elegant character imagery.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成一张书卷气息的年轻女性在阳光花园中的写实编辑风格肖像，适合生活方式摄影、文学品牌或优雅角色形象。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成一張書卷氣息的年輕女性在陽光花園中的寫實編輯風格肖像，適合生活風格攝影、文學品牌或優雅角色形象。
description_i18n.ja: 日差しの庭園で佇む読書好きな若い女性のリアルな編集スタイルのポートレートを生成。ライフスタイル写真、文学ブランディング、エレガントなキャラクター画像に最適です。
description_i18n.ko: 햇살 가득한 정원에서 책을 좋아하는 젊은 여성의 사실적인 에디토리얼 스타일 초상화를 생성합니다. 라이프스타일 사진, 문학 브랜딩 또는 우아한 캐릭터 이미지에 적합합니다.
description_i18n.de: Erstellt ein realistisches Editorial-Porträt einer belesenen jungen Frau in einem sonnigen Garten, ideal für Lifestyle-Fotografie, literarisches Branding oder elegante Charakterbilder.
description_i18n.fr: Génère un portrait éditorial réaliste d'une jeune femme intellectuelle dans un jardin ensoleillé, idéal pour la photographie lifestyle, le branding littéraire ou l'imagerie de personnages élégants.
description_i18n.ru: Создаёт реалистичный редакционный портрет молодой женщины-интеллектуалки в солнечном саду, идеален для лайфстайл-фотографии, литературного брендинга или элегантных образов персонажей.
description_i18n.es: Genera un retrato editorial realista de una joven intelectual en un jardín soleado, ideal para fotografía lifestyle, branding literario o imágenes elegantes de personajes.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera um retrato editorial realista de uma jovem intelectual em um jardim ensolarado, ideal para fotografia lifestyle, branding literário ou imagens elegantes de personagens.
description_i18n.it: Genera un ritratto editoriale realistico di una giovane donna intellettuale in un giardino soleggiato, ideale per fotografia lifestyle, branding letterario o immagini eleganti di personaggi.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo chân dung phong cách biên tập chân thực của một phụ nữ trẻ yêu sách trong khu vườn đầy nắng, lý tưởng cho nhiếp ảnh phong cách sống, thương hiệu văn học hoặc hình ảnh nhân vật thanh lịch.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje realistyczny portret redakcyjny młodej kobiety miłośniczki książek w słonecznym ogrodzie, idealny do fotografii lifestylowej, brandingu literackiego lub eleganckich zdjęć postaci.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan potret gaya editorial realistis seorang wanita muda yang suka membaca di taman yang cerah, ideal untuk fotografi gaya hidup, branding literatur, atau citra karakter yang elegan.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een realistisch redactioneel portret van een boekenwurm in een zonnige tuin, ideaal voor lifestyle fotografie, literaire branding of elegante personage-afbeeldingen.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ صورة شخصية واقعية بأسلوب تحريري لامرأة شابة محبة للكتب في حديقة مشمسة، مثالية لتصوير أسلوب الحياة، أو العلامات التجارية الأدبية، أو صور الشخصيات الأنيقة.
description_i18n.tr: Güneşli bir bahçede kitap seven genç bir kadının gerçekçi editorial tarzda portresini oluşturur, yaşam tarzı fotoğrafçılığı, edebi markalaşma veya zarif karakter görselleri için idealdir.
description_i18n.uk: Створює реалістичний редакційний портрет молодої жінки-інтелектуалки в сонячному саду, ідеальний для лайфстайл-фотографії, літературного брендингу або елегантних образів персонажів.
description_i18n.en: This prompt generates a realistic editorial-style portrait of a bookish young woman in a sunlit garden, ideal for lifestyle photography, literary branding, or elegant character imagery.

query.en: A realistic outdoor portrait of a thoughtful, naturally beautiful young woman standing on a garden path in soft golden-hour light. She is framed from about mid-thigh upward, centered in the image, facing the camera with a relaxed upright posture. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} long, voluminous, loosely curly hair with a slightly tousled texture, falling around her shoulders. Dress her in an oversized cream-white knit sweater with long sleeves and dark high-waisted loose trousers or a flowing skirt-like bottom in deep navy or black. A pair of thin round eyeglasses hangs from the neckline of the sweater. In one hand she holds a sharpened yellow pencil, and in the other she carries an open sketchbook or notebook with slightly worn pages, suggesting she is writing, sketching, or observing nature. The mood should feel literary, artistic, intelligent, and understated rather than glamorous. Place her in a lush garden with 1 visible stone pathway, abundant soft greenery, and blurred flowers in the foreground and background. Use shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, warm sunlight filtering through trees behind her, and gentle natural highlights on her hair and sweater. The image should look like a candid editorial photograph, highly realistic, soft and tasteful, with muted natural colors, subtle texture, and an atmosphere of calm, cultured beauty. Vertical composition, 4:5 portrait orientation.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：A realistic outdoor portrait of a thoughtful, naturally beautiful young woman standing on a garden path in soft golden-hour light. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} long, voluminous, loosely curly hair with a slightly tousled texture, falling around her shoulders. A pair of thin round eyeglasses hangs from the neckline of the sweater. In one hand she holds a sharpened yellow pencil, and in the other she carries an open sketchbook or notebook with slightly worn pages, suggesting she is writing, sketching, or observing nature. The mood should feel literary, artistic, intelligent, and understated rather than glamorous. The image should look like a candid editorial photograph, highly realistic, soft and tasteful, with muted natural colors, subtle texture, and an atmosphere of calm, cultured beauty. Vertical composition, 4:5 portrait orientation.
